title: Create:Fluid Stuffs
description: A Create Addon adds some fluid  stuffs
body:
This mod add some fluid stuffs to Create mod:

**Multi fluids tank**

holds up to 8 types of fluid in this tank

**Andesite bucket**

transfer fluids directly from any fluid tanks (Like basin, spout, drainer, Fluids Drawers and so on)

**Andesite jar**

holds 10mb of any fluids for filtering nbt fluids for smart pipe

 

# Version 1.1.0 and above compacts with Create 6
